storeOs.cloudCompatibility: PARTIAL — validate, prompt-build, and LLM synthesis run in both modes. In cloud mode: (1) AJV schema validation is skipped (replaced by inline required-field and enum checks in Node 5), (2) artifact write (strategy-synthesis.json) is skipped, (3) strategy_synthesis returned inline. Inline validation always runs in both modes.
storeOs.invocation: Called as a subworkflow by orchestrate-phase1 (after build-competitor-clusters). Expects Subworkflow Trigger input: { project_id, runtime_config, store_profile, market_intelligence, brand_positioning, competitor_clusters, normalized_intake_payload }
storeOs.output: { project_id, artifact_name, artifact_path, strategy_synthesis, runtime_config, status, cloud_mode, cloud_warnings, notes, envelope }
storeOs.synthesisScope: Cross-artifact synthesis. Consumes all four upstream planning artifacts (store_profile, market_intelligence, brand_positioning, competitor_clusters) and produces a single strategy_synthesis object that is the primary strategic input for all downstream planning phases.
storeOs.evidenceBoundary: LLM inference from internal signals only. No external research, no crawling, no competitive intelligence APIs. All outputs (growth_thesis, moat_hypotheses, opportunity_priorities, etc.) are planning hypotheses requiring human review.
setupRequired: Replace REPLACE_WITH_N8N_OPENAI_CREDENTIAL_ID in 'LLM Synthesis: Strategy' with your n8n OpenAI credential ID.
Self-hosted: ensure STORE_OS_AJV_SCHEMA_PATH points to the schemas/ directory containing strategy-synthesis.schema.json and ajv@8 is installed in n8n node_modules.
Cloud mode: OpenAI credential must be configured in n8n. strategy_synthesis is returned inline — no disk write.
cloudSkipped: AJV schema validation — no local schema files in n8n Cloud (replaced by inline required-field and enum checks in Node 5)
Artifact write (strategy-synthesis.json) — no filesystem in n8n Cloud
notes: Phase 16: New phase. strategy_synthesis is the handlungsleitend artifact for all downstream planning phases. Synthesis draws on all four upstream planning artifacts.
